understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to move all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+) simultaneously within a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A piece is selected by clicking it, then it can be moved via MOVE actions or by clicking another position. Movement can be blocked by walls or obstacles. Clicking on an empty tile without a piece attempts to move the selected piece there if a path exists. MOVE_RIGHT and similar actions attempt to slide the selected piece but fail if blocked. The level requires all goals to be filled at once to win.
